index.html.title: Home | Oasis of Change, Inc.
index.html.description: Oasis of Change is a nonprofit making the internet more sustainable through low-carbon digital practices, transparent impact reporting, and environmental programs including tree planting.

about.html.description: Discover Oasis of Change's mission to build a more sustainable digital future—our story, founder Gabriel Dalton, and board of directors.

company.html.description: Explore Oasis of Change—our story, mission, leadership, annual reports, and news.

contact.html.description: Contact Oasis of Change for partnerships, media requests, or questions about digital sustainability, accessibility, and impact programs.

initiatives.html.title: Initiatives | Oasis of Change, Inc.
initiatives.html.description: Explore Oasis of Change initiatives including Web-Ready, VCASSE, Sustainable Technology Week, and platforms that turn mission-driven ideas into measurable impact.

nonprofits.html.description: Oasis of Change partners with nonprofits to secure technology grants, reduce website carbon and energy use, and improve accessibility through our Web-Ready programme.

get_involved.html.description: Volunteer, partner, donate, or collaborate with Oasis of Change to grow digital sustainability and climate-conscious technology worldwide.

accessibility_statement.html.description: Oasis of Change is committed to improving website accessibility for everyone, with ongoing review, testing, and inclusive design practices.

privacy-policy.html.description: How Oasis of Change collects, uses, and protects information submitted through this website, including forms, inquiries, analytics, and communications.

vcasse.html.description: VCASSE—the Vancouver Centre for AI Safety, Sustainability, and Ethics—advances responsible AI and environmental stewardship through research and collaboration.

sustainable-technology-week.html.description: Sustainable Technology Week brings together education and innovation where technology meets environmental responsibility and climate-conscious design.

wra_platform.html.description: Learn about the Web-Ready Access Platform and how it extends digital access through tools aligned with Oasis of Change's sustainability mission.

tree_planting.html.description: How Oasis of Change reinvests in reforestation and transparent reporting—connecting digital sustainability work to real-world environmental impact.

denman-place-mall.html.description: How we rebuilt the Denman Place Mall website to improve performance, reduce digital waste, and better serve visitors on mobile devices.

mittler-senior-technology.html.description: Case study: how Mittler Senior Technology reached roughly 98% lower energy use and moved from an F to a B digital sustainability rating, cutting emissions and water use at scale with Oasis of Change.

blog/accessible-web-nonprofits.html.description: Web accessibility isn't optional — it's essential. Learn how nonprofits can build inclusive websites that work for everyone, including people with disabilities.

blog/ai-ethics-environment.html.description: Artificial intelligence holds enormous potential for environmental good — but its own carbon cost is growing fast. How do we build AI responsibly?

blog/tree-planting-update.html.description: A look back at our 2025 tree planting milestone — 10,000 trees planted across reforestation sites, offsetting carbon and restoring ecosystems.

blog/website-carbon-footprint.html.description: Every website generates carbon emissions. Learn how data centres, page weight, and user traffic contribute to digital pollution — and what you can do about it.

blog/wra-platform-launch.html.description: The WRA Platform helps nonprofits build accessible, lower-carbon websites and access digital grants. Here's what it is, why we built it, and how to get involved.
